caption.caption: A close-up of a plate of Korean sea squirt, a translucent dish garnished with red and green chili threads.

level2.caption: A translucent dish is garnished with red and green chili threads on a white plate.

level3.caption: This Korean cuisine features a refreshing, chilled preparation garnished with vibrant chili threads.

level4.caption: This Korean *haeparinaengchae*, a chilled appetizer made with shredded jellyfish, is garnished with vibrant chili threads, offering a refreshing and visually appealing dish often served as part of a larger Korean meal.

caption.caption: A weathered wooden structure with frayed rope hanging from it is framed against a cloudy sky and vibrant greenery.

level2.caption: A close-up view showcases the aged wood and hanging rope of a structure set against a backdrop of clouds and lush plants.

level3.caption: A weathered architectural element in Korea features aged wood and hanging rope contrasted with a backdrop of clouds and vibrant greenery.

level4.caption: This weathered Chunyeo, a traditional Korean architectural element used to hoist roof tiles during construction and repair, features aged wood and hanging rope against a backdrop of clouds and vibrant greenery, symbolizing both practicality and the enduring nature of Korean craftsmanship.

caption.caption: A vintage metal heating device with accompanying tools is displayed on a white surface, evoking a sense of historical scientific or industrial equipment.

level2.caption: A collection of vintage metal tools and a heating device are arranged on a white surface, reminiscent of historical equipment.

level3.caption: This collection of vintage metal tools and a heating device from Korea was used in the preparation of a popular street snack.

level4.caption: This collection of vintage metal tools and a heating device from Korea was used to create *dalgona*, a popular street snack traditionally made with melted sugar and imprinted with a design using the tools.

caption.caption: A vibrant and elaborate dragon dance performance unfolds with performers skillfully maneuvering the colorful, scaled creature amidst a crowd and cityscape.

level2.caption: A large, colorful dragon-like structure is being carried or maneuvered by people in an outdoor setting with buildings in the background.

level3.caption: This vibrant game tradition features a large, colorful structure being carried by performers in Korea.

level4.caption: This vibrant game tradition features the Byeokgolje Ssangnyong Nori, a large, colorful double dragon structure carried by performers in Korea, symbolizing good fortune and prosperity during celebratory rituals.

level3.caption: A group of people in Korea are gathered in a living room, enjoying a traditional game together.

level4.caption: A group of people in Korea are gathered in a living room playing Yunnori, a traditional board game often enjoyed during Seollal (Korean Lunar New Year) involving throwing wooden sticks to move pieces around a board.
